title: AutoMechInterp Blinded Holdout Author Attestation
description: Sworn statement an external Holdout Author submits to the Custodian alongside each sealed bundle, per methodology/blinded_holdout_protocol.md.

submission_id.description: Custodian-issued opaque identifier for this submission. Must match the directory name under holdout/submissions/ (for external_blinded) or holdout/pilot/submissions/ (for maintainer_pilot).

submission_kind.description: Classifies this submission. Only 'external_blinded' submissions count as external evidence; 'maintainer_pilot' submissions exist only to validate the Custodian pipeline end-to-end and are always reported as a separate, non-evidence slice in holdout/results_summary.json.

submitted_at_utc.description: UTC timestamp at which the Author transmitted the sealed bundle to the Custodian.

author_institution.description: Free-text identifier of the authoring institution. Sufficient to confirm institutional independence from the AutoMechInterp maintainers; need not identify a specific person.

attestation_text.description: Author-supplied sworn statement. For submission_kind='external_blinded': must affirm that the bundle was authored using only the publicly released contract specification, that no AutoMechInterp maintainer was consulted about acceptance heuristics or accepted-claim examples during authoring, and that the bundle has not been pre-evaluated against the pinned evaluator before submission. For submission_kind='maintainer_pilot': must explicitly disclaim blinded authorship and state the pilot exists solely to exercise the Custodian evaluation pipeline.

attestation_signature.description: Cryptographic or institutional signature over (submission_id, submission_kind, submitted_at_utc, author_institution, contract_pin, attestation_text). For ``submission_kind=='external_blinded'`` this MUST be a JSON object of the form ``{"scheme": <ed25519|rsa-pss-sha256|institutional-pgp>, "signature": <base64>, "public_key": <base64>, "canonicalization": <sorted-json|jcs>}`` (see CUSTODIAN_RUNBOOK.md §Attestation Signature Scheme). For ``submission_kind=='maintainer_pilot'`` the literal sentinel string ``"PILOT-NO-SIGNATURE: ..."`` is permitted because pilot submissions are never counted as external evidence; the Custodian rejects any ``external_blinded`` submission whose signature is a bare string.
